ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., metal, polymer, composite) */,
  "elastic_modulus" REAL /* Elastic modulus of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity of the material */,
  "chemical_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test method */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the equipment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the test */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test */,
  "ambient_pressure" REAL /* Ambient pressure during the test */,
  "atmosphere" TEXT /* Atmosphere during the test (e.g., air, nitrogen) */,
  "atmospheric_conditions" TEXT /* Additional atmospheric conditions (e.g., wind speed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result (e.g., force, strain, energy) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geometric_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geometric property */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the geometric property (e.g., height, area, volume) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the geometric property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the geometric property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the geometric property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curvature_properties" (
  "curvature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curvature property */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the curvature property belongs to */,
  "curvature_name" TEXT /* Name of the curvature property (e.g., mean curvature, min radius, max radius) */,
  "curvature_value" REAL /* Value of the curvature property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the curvature property */,
  "curvature_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the curvature property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curvature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the collaborator is working on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
